string 2:
Thank goodness you are awake! This is the World of Dreams.
It seems that someone has led you astray.
The culprit is hiding here somewhere! You must find them!

It looks like you're back where you started from. It will
not let its prey escape so easily...

Around and around the same place over and over again...
What a nightmare...

No such thing as common sense here... But something's amiss!
I'm sure you can feel it... Don't miss it.
Are you out of ideas...? Well, well...
Try thinking outside the box!
Ah, it's you! Hah! How'd you get caught in this weird old place?

But now's not the time to be getting all sappy.
We can talk once we've gotten ourselves out of here!
The culprit's abilities seem similar to mine...

I sometimes talk about dreams with Lord Bacchusmon.
He seems to be having nightmares lately.

He must be blaming himself for not being able to protect
Lady Sirenmon, even in his dreams...

Everyone should at least experience good dreams... Now
is the time to make the most of such an experience.

I understand who we are dealing with, because we are
similar... Someone must be controlling this space!

The rules of reality do not apply in dreams. Even if it feels like 
you are going forward, it may actually be back.

If we want to move forward... we must adapt ourselves to
the rules of this dream world.

The one who created this space is quite tricky... I have a
feeling we have a similar mindset.

I am sure that the "correct" way will not work. In such a world... 
why not try doing everything the other way around?

We need to question everything we see. There may be a
hidden path somewhere.

We are back where we began. Around and around the same 
place over and over again... It is like a nightmare, is it not?

However, we must not give up, for there are no dreams from 
which one cannot awake eventually.
Are you out of ideas...? Well, well...
Try thinking in a way that is new!
